nodes.title_zh: 循环构件（五件 + 记忆）
nodes.summary_zh: Osmani 的具体解剖：定时自动化、git worktree、skills、插件/连接器、子 agent（maker/checker），外加一处活在单次对话之外、记录已完成与待办的外部记忆（markdown 或 Linear）。这是一位作者的分类法，尚非通用标准。
nodes.summary_en: Osmani's concrete anatomy: scheduled automations, git worktrees, skills, plugins/connectors, subagents (maker/checker), plus one external memory store (a markdown file or Linear board) that lives outside a single conversation and holds what's done and what's next. This is one author's taxonomy, not yet a standard.

nodes.summary_zh: 按定时器自行触发，做发现和分诊——loop engineering 与单纯 harness 的关键区别（harness 装上定时器、自己喂自己）。
nodes.summary_en: Fires on a timer to do discovery and triage by itself — the key difference between loop engineering and a bare harness (a harness on a timer that feeds itself).

nodes.summary_zh: 让并行 agent 互不踩脚的隔离单元；OpenAI 每次变更启一个 app 实例（per-worktree），是并行循环的前提，也是可回滚的基础。
nodes.summary_en: The isolation unit that keeps parallel agents from stepping on each other; OpenAI boots one app instance per worktree per change. It is the precondition for parallel loops and the basis for rollback.

nodes.summary_zh: 把『请记得跑测试』（建议、可忽略）变成『测试不过这一轮不能结束』（由 harness 强制）。可在 session/turn 或每次工具调用前后触发 shell/HTTP/LLM；Stop hook 退出码 2 阻止停止。
nodes.summary_en: Turns 'please remember to run tests' (advisory, ignorable) into 'the turn cannot end until tests pass' (enforced by the harness). Fires shell/HTTP/LLM at session/turn or around each tool call; a Stop hook with exit code 2 prevents stopping.

nodes.summary_zh: 一个 agent 出主意、另一个检查——实现 maker/checker 分离的机制。代价：每个子 agent 各自跑模型和工具，token 成本更高。
nodes.summary_en: One agent has the idea and a different one checks it — the mechanism that implements maker/checker separation. Cost: each subagent runs its own model and tools, so token cost rises.

nodes.summary_zh: 把成功方法与常见错误写进可复用的 skills/AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md/规则文件，是循环的知识记忆层。安全提醒：skills 含指令和代码，应只从可信来源安装并审计。
nodes.summary_en: Capturing successful methods and common errors into reusable skills/AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md/rules files is the loop's knowledge-memory layer. Security caveat: skills contain instructions and code, so install only from trusted sources and audit them.

nodes.summary_zh: 活在单次对话之外、记录已完成与待办的存储（markdown 或 Linear），让循环在上下文重置后存活——对应 Reflexion 情景记忆缓冲的工程化对应物。是对抗上下文漂移的关键。
nodes.summary_en: A store that lives outside a single conversation and holds what's done and what's next (markdown or Linear), letting the loop survive context resets — the engineering counterpart of Reflexion's episodic memory buffer and a key defense against context drift.

nodes.summary_zh: 把 agent 接入你已在用的工具（Jira、GitHub、Slack、Docs）的插件/连接器层，让循环能跨外部系统发现任务和写回结果。
nodes.summary_en: The plugin/connector layer that plugs the agent into the tools you already use (Jira, GitHub, Slack, Docs), letting the loop discover work and write results back across external systems.

nodes.title_zh: CDP-per-worktree 修复-重启-复验循环
nodes.summary_zh: OpenAI 把 Chrome DevTools Protocol 接入运行时，每个 worktree 启一个 app 实例：选目标→快照前后状态→观察运行时事件→修复→重启→循环复验直到 app 干净。体现 act/check/fix 迭代。
nodes.summary_en: OpenAI wired the Chrome DevTools Protocol into the runtime and booted one app instance per worktree: select a target, snapshot before/after, observe runtime events, apply fixes, restart, and loop re-validation until the app is clean. Embodies the act/check/fix iteration.

nodes.summary_zh: Anthropic：Stop hook 把检查作为脚本运行并阻止本轮结束直到通过，但连续 8 次阻塞后 Claude Code 覆盖并结束——一个带硬性最大轮数后备的真实验证闸门。没有停止条件的循环就是自动化浪费。
nodes.summary_en: Anthropic: a Stop hook runs the check as a script and blocks the turn from ending until it passes, but Claude Code overrides it and ends the turn after 8 consecutive blocks — a real verification gate with a hard max-iteration backstop. A loop with no stop condition is automated waste.

nodes.summary_zh: 失败停止：连续 N 次同类失败、超最大轮数、范围超限、需受限资源、需求矛盾、安全/数据风险。人工升级：产品判断、架构选择、生产权限、改公共 API、测试不可信。
nodes.summary_en: Failure stops: N consecutive same-type failures, max iterations hit, scope exceeded, restricted resource needed, requirement contradiction, security/data risk. Human escalation: product judgment, architecture choice, production permission, public-API change, untrustworthy/flaky tests.

nodes.summary_zh: 循环里最有用的结构：让一个独立模型/agent 评判完成度，写代码的不给自己打分——因为它对自己作业太宽容。done 是声明而非证明，你的工作是交付已确认能跑的代码。
nodes.summary_en: The most useful structural element of a loop: a separate model/agent grades completion so the agent that wrote the code does not judge it — it is too nice grading its own homework. Done is a claim, not a proof; your job is to ship code you confirmed works.

nodes.summary_zh: reviewer 在全新子 agent 上下文中只看 diff 和验收标准（看不到产生改动的推理），独立评判。警告：找缺口的 reviewer 即便代码正确也会报缺口，导致过度工程——只标记影响正确性/既定需求的缺口，其余视为可选。
nodes.summary_en: A reviewer in a fresh subagent context sees only the diff and the criteria (not the reasoning that produced the change) and judges on its own terms. Warning: a gap-seeking reviewer reports gaps even on sound work, causing over-engineering — flag only gaps affecting correctness or stated requirements, treat the rest as optional.

nodes.title_zh: 人在循环之上 vs 之内
nodes.summary_zh: in-the-loop：人在内循环逐步批准，适合高风险低可逆。on-the-loop：人定目标/规则/验收/边界并在检查点审查，适合低风险可逆有测试。注：本区分在本轮调研未产出独立验证声明。
nodes.summary_en: In-the-loop: the human approves consequential steps inside the cycle — for high-risk, low-reversibility work. On-the-loop: the human sets goals/rules/acceptance/boundaries and reviews at checkpoints — for low-risk, reversible, well-tested work. Note: this distinction produced no independently-verified claim in this run.

nodes.title_zh: 按爆炸半径决定自主度
nodes.summary_zh: 自主度应是爆炸半径 × 可逆性 × 反馈质量的函数。无测试 + 不可逆 = 永远人在循环内。这是治理的经验法则，也是『越自动越好』误区的解药。
nodes.summary_en: Autonomy should be a function of blast radius × reversibility × feedback quality. No tests + irreversible = always human-in-the-loop. This is the governance rule of thumb and the antidote to the 'more autonomy is always better' misconception.

nodes.summary_zh: implementer / tester / reviewer / security / docs 等角色并行。前提是隔离（worktree、分支、独立 dev DB、沙箱、独立日志和权限），否则并发 agent 会污染彼此状态。
nodes.summary_en: Parallel roles — implementer / tester / reviewer / security / docs. The precondition is isolation (worktree, branch, separate dev DB, sandbox, separate logs and permissions); otherwise concurrent agents corrupt each other's state.
